001package net.okocraft.box.api.taskfactory;
002
003import org.jetbrains.annotations.NotNull;
004
005import java.util.concurrent.CompletableFuture;
006import java.util.function.Supplier;
007
008/**
009 * An interface to create {@link CompletableFuture}s.
010 */
011public interface TaskFactory {
012
013    /**
014     * Creates a {@link CompletableFuture} to run the task on main thread.
015     *
016     * @param task the task to run
017     * @return the new {@link CompletableFuture}
018     */
019    @NotNull CompletableFuture<Void> run(@NotNull Runnable task);
020
021    /**
022     * Creates a {@link CompletableFuture} to supply values on main thread.
023     *
024     * @param supplier the supplier
025     * @param <T>      the value type
026     * @return the new {@link CompletableFuture}
027     */
028    <T> @NotNull CompletableFuture<T> supply(@NotNull Supplier<T> supplier);
029
030    /**
031     * Creates a {@link CompletableFuture} to run the task asynchronously.
032     *
033     * @param task the task to run
034     * @return the new {@link CompletableFuture}
035     */
036    @NotNull CompletableFuture<Void> runAsync(@NotNull Runnable task);
037
038    /**
039     * Creates a {@link CompletableFuture} to supply values asynchronously.
040     *
041     * @param supplier the supplier
042     * @param <T>      the value type
043     * @return the new {@link CompletableFuture}
044     */
045    <T> @NotNull CompletableFuture<T> supplyAsync(@NotNull Supplier<T> supplier);
046
047}
